meta.title: [4K Slow-Mo] Starship Flight 6 Supercut w/ Clean Audio
meta.description:
Enjoy this incredible audio and video from around the launch pad of the 6th full stack flight test of Starship, featuring a Super Heavy Booster aborted catch in late afternoon lighting!!! 4K slow motion captured on various cameras including ZCam, Freefly Ember, BlackMagic 12K Ursa, and RED Komodo X with SIGMA lenses and Meade Telescopes.

SpaceX's 6th launch of Starship took place on November 19th, 2024, from Starbase, TX. Both the Super Heavy booster and the Starship upper stage completed their full duration burn placing them on nominal trajectories. Starship performed its first zero-g relight of a Raptor engine. Both stages splashed down softly. 

New merch out now!!!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

To license content: Ryan@CosmicPerspective.com

https://www.youtube.com/cosmicperspective

VR content - https://cosmicperspective.com/

End song: "Scale of it all" by Everyday Astronaut

Timestamps:
00:00 - Intro
00:09 - Liftoff Zoom
00:56 - Waves Realtime
01:21 - Waves Slow Mo
02:13 - Close Track
02:46 - Close Tight
03:01 - Close Tight Slow Mo
03:43 - Pad Track
04:27 - Pad Track Slow Mo
05:00 - Pad Tight Slow Mo
05:24 - Sapphire Wide
06:04 - Sapphire Tracker Realtime
13:27 - Ryan Tracker Slow Mo

Crew: Ryan Chylinski, Andrew Keating, Spencer Tetik, John Pisani, Steve Wilson, MaryLiz Chylinski, Nick Jakubik, Andrew Taylor, Collin Thrash, Ben Stineman, Ryan & Ella Kronenburg, Benny Burtt & Jason Achilles

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!

All music is original! Check out my album "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) or click here for easy links - http://everydayastronaut.com/music
